localized_texts.text: Genting Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park

Head to the Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park in First World Plaza for an exciting, all-day adventure! Embrace the thrills and frills of the park, surrounded by beautiful Genting Highlands. Start your adventure by exploring the expansive indoor theme park. Test your limits and make sure to hop on one of their many exhilarating rides. Spin around on their colorful Royal Carousel or take a heart-stopping plunge on the Sky Towers at gravity-defying speeds. The possibilities are endless!Rides Introduction:Family Rides:Jumping Spurs - A mini-jumping tower featuring gentle drops and climbs, designed for children. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 92cm and 122cm in height.Boo Boo Bump - A fun miniature bumper car ride where children can gently bump their way around. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 105cm and 140cm in height.Ride ‘Em Round - A classic merry-go-round with seats that move up and down, perfect for children. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 90cm and 122cm in height.Copper Express - A family-friendly open-top train ride with mild curves. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Tea Cups - An oversized spinning tea cup ride offering multiple twirling motions for the whole family. Riders under 105cm in height are not permitted. Children between 105cm and 130cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Chariot Cruise - A family-friendly flying cruise that loops around the park. Riders under 110cm or over 195cm in height are not permitted. Children between 110cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Adventure Rides:Loop de Loop - A miniature track ride with gentle curves and slopes, designed for children. Parental supervision is required at all times. Riders must be between 90cm and 122cm in height.Balloon Race - A family-friendly balloon ride featuring fast spins and twirls. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Royal Carousel - A grand, double-story carousel adorned with intricately carved horses and chariots. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Space Cadets - A family-friendly ride with controllable flying motions, allowing guests to pilot their own adventure. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Soaring Ships - A suspended ride that offers breathtaking aerial views of the park, perfect for the whole family. Riders under 80cm in height are not permitted. Children between 80cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Sky Towers - An exhilarating drop tower ride that plunges at gravity-defying speeds. Riders under 105cm in height are not permitted. Children between 105cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Skyscraper - A towering Ferris wheel with colorful gondolas, offering a magnificent panoramic view of the park. Riders under 90cm in height are not permitted. Children between 90cm and 122cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Thrill Rides:Disco! - A gigantic spinning disc that swings back and forth while rotating rapidly, gaining speed as it travels. Riders under 122cm in height are not permitted.Spin Crazy - An extreme spinning pendulum that soars through the air with thrilling 360-degree rotations. Riders under 130cm or over 195cm in height are not permitted.Super Glider - A suspended lie-down coaster featuring sharp turns, sudden drops, and high-speed curves—perfect for thrill-seekers. Riders under 135cm in height are not permitted.Power Surge - A high-intensity ride with wild spinning motions and upside-down thrills. Riders under 122cm in height are not permitted.Music Express - A fast-spinning ride with sudden slopes, twirling motion, and a thrilling backward surge. Riders under 130cm in height are not permitted. Children between 130cm and 140cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.Bumper Boss - A dynamic bumper car arena where guests can unleash their inner racer. Riders under 120cm in height are not permitted. Children between 120cm and 130cm must be accompanied by a supervising companion aged 16 or above with a valid wristband or ticket.
Rides and Attractions: The park spans over 400,000 sq ft and offers more than 20 rides for the whole family.
Embrace the thrills and frills of the park, surrounded by beautiful Genting Highlands.
Family Rides: Enjoy family rides with family such as Jumping Spurs, Boo Boo Bump, Ride ‘Em Round, Copper Express, Tea Cups, and Chariot Cruise.
Adventure Rides: Enjoy adventure rides such as Loop de Loop, Balloon Race, Royal Carousel, Space Cadets, Bumper Boss, Music Express, Power Surge etcs.
Thrill Rides: Enjoy thrill rides such a Disco!, Spin Crazy and Super Glider.

Rides Category: Family Rides: Enjoy family rides with family such as Jumping Spurs, Boo Boo Bump, Ride ‘Em Round, Copper Express, Tea Cups, and Chariot Cruise. Adventure Rides: Enjoy adventure rides such as Loop de Loop, Balloon Race, Royal Carousel, Space Cadets, Bumper Boss, Music Express, Power Surge, Soaring Ships, Sky Towers and Skyscraper. Thrill Rides: Enjoy thrill rides such a Disco!, Spin Crazy and Super Glider.
Food & Drinks: Purchase within the park, outside options may be restricted.
Accessibility: Inquire about services for guests with disabilities.
Smoking: Follow designated smoking areas.
What’s included: One day unlimited experience based on available rides in Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Customer is to exchange the wristband at the Skytropolis Indooor Theme Park ticketing counter

Terms & Conditions: Admission The ticket is valid for 1 month from the date of purchase. Malaysian rates are valid for Malaysian Citizens only. Guests must present their physical Malaysian Identification Card for verification prior to park admission. Non-Malaysian rates are applicable for international travelers. Re-entry to the venue is permitted. Guests must show their ticket / wristband / stamp upon re-entry at the entrance.Eligibility Pregnant mothers under 14 weeks or above 33 weeks of gestation must provide a medical letter or doctor’s appointment card as proof.Attraction Access Please refer to the official website for the height requirements for different rides: https://www.rwgenting.com/en/theme-parks/skytropolis-indoor-theme-park.html Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park is open as usual and accessible via Paris Baguette, Multi Level Escalator, and Swenson.Additional Information In the event of a wrong ticket purchased, guests are required to top up the price difference based on the Walk-In rate for park entry.Important Notes There are no lockers available onsite. Guests are solely responsible for their own belongings.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy

Terms & Conditions: Admission The ticket is valid for 1 month from the date of purchase. Malaysian rates are valid for Malaysian Citizens only. Guests must present their physical Malaysian Identification Card for verification prior to park admission. Non-Malaysian rates are applicable for international travelers. Re-entry to the venue is permitted. Guests must show their ticket / wristband / stamp upon re-entry at the entrance. Eligibility Pregnant mothers under 14 weeks or above 33 weeks of gestation must provide a medical letter or doctor’s appointment card as proof. Attraction Access Please refer to the official website for the height requirements for different rides: https://www.rwgenting.com/en/theme-parks/skytropolis-indoor-theme-park.html Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park is open as usual and accessible via Paris Baguette, Multi Level Escalator, and Swenson. Additional Information In the event of a wrong ticket purchased, guests are required to top up the price difference based on the Walk-In rate for park entry. Important Notes There are no lockers available onsite. Guests are solely responsible for their own belongings.
What’s included: Pay Per Ride: Thrill (ticket permits a one-time experience on one ride.)
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing Counter

Terms & Conditions: Admission Each ticket permits a one-time experience on one ride only. Customer must show the QR Code via mobile app or booking confirmation at the turnstile for ticket redemption. Re-entry to the venue is permitted. Guests must show their ticket / wristband / stamp upon re-entry at the entrance.Eligibility There are no child ticket prices at Skytropolis Indoor Theme Park. Ticket prices are the same for both adults and children. Guests must comply with the minimum height requirements for specific rides.Attraction Access Ride access is subject to availability on the day of visit.Additional Information Not valid in conjunction with other ongoing promotions (e.g., credit card promotions, promo codes, payment gateway promotions, discounts, offers, or privilege cards unless otherwise stated). This offer is non-transferable and not exchangeable for cash. The management reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions without prior notice.Important Notes Tickets are non-refundable and non-cancellable once issued. There are no lockers available onsite. Guests are solely responsible for their own belongings.
What’s included: Pay Per Ride: Family & Adventure (ticket permits a one-time experience on one ride.)
1-Day Unlimited Ride Pass [Malaysian]
1-Day Unlimited Ride Pass [Non-Malaysian]
1 Ticket - Pay Per Ride: Thrill [Malaysian]
1 Ticket - Pay Per Ride: Thrill [Non-Malaysian]
1 Ticket - Pay Per Ride: Family & Adventure [Malaysian]
1 Ticket - Pay Per Ride: Family & Adventure [Non-Malaysian]
